education.degree: Master of Science : Information Technology Management
Bachelor of Science : Business Administration and Management, Marketing and Management, International Business
education.field_of_study: Business Administration and Management, Marketing and Management, International Business

experience.title: Director of Information Technology
experience.description: Develops, tracks and controls long-term information technology operating budgets and cost and benefit analyses for IT spending initiatives. Leads and assists technical upgrade projects for clients by coordinating with consultants and developers for data migration and integrations. Coordinates with management teams to plan, develop, align and execute strategies that would meet client's vision, mission and purpose.

experience.title: Senior Consulting IT Program Manager
experience.description: Managed and implemented concurrent projects relating to business process re-engineering, software development and upgrades to foster productivity, throughput, and end-user engagement. Performed program research and analyzed data collection to develop cost estimates and budgets.

experience.title: Business Products Specialist
experience.description: Developed and fostered relationships with business owners and key executives to assess dynamic risk mitigation and business insurance needs and deliver solutions. Successfully managed internal & external stakeholder engagement to aid in process and resource improvements to align strategic and industry compliance objectives.

experience.title: Product Design Project Team Lead
experience.description: Demonstrated efficacy throughout project & product life cycles in applying flexible change management deliverables including training, communications, and stakeholder engagement to increase end-user adoption of project implementations.
